title: asterocephalus incanus
side_effects: Asterocephalus incanus can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Prolonged use of the plant may also cause stomach problems, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In some cases, excessive consumption of asterocephalus incanus can lead to liver damage and increased risk of bleeding. Furthermore, improper use of the plant may interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners and diabetes medications, exacerbating underlying health conditions.
